summary: Added one surgical exit-bridge sentence so the ledger reveal at the end of Chapter 1 hands off cleanly to the oilcloth bundle Halima carries into Chapter 2's schoolroom. The opening was left intact because its labor-room entry does not duplicate the adjacent chapter's schoolhouse scaffold, and no calibration-only example lines from the style bible appeared verbatim in the draft.
edits: Added a final-page bridge tying the opened ledger to the next morning's hidden bag bundle.
Kept the opening construction unchanged because it is structurally distinct from the adjacent chapter opening.
Verified that no style-bible calibration example lines appeared verbatim in the chapter.
